FieldDefinition.description: Maximum number of connections in the pool
FieldDefinition.name: maxConnections

ServiceDefinition.description: fix data null on machine_status for data with start_date < 1 week ago
ServiceDefinition.name: FixDataNull

ServiceDefinition.description: The service provides the duration in seconds for the given machine within the given time frame on 24 hours base.
ServiceDefinition.name: GetMachineStatusTimeOn24HoursBase

ServiceDefinition.description: combine data from machine_status and operator_feedback table in DB
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryScheduleChartDataCombine

ServiceDefinition.description: return shift of group in time span
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryShiftOfMachine

Row.sql: -------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Add machine maintenance log entry to DB -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [09 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development -- [DONE] [09 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Deleted cte -- [DONE] [09 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added Input period, created_at, and is_active -- [DONE] [21 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Deleted Some Input -------------------------------------------------------------- INSERT INTO transactions.machine_maintenance_log ( item_id, planned_maintenance_date , is_complete , is_active , created_at , status ) VALUES ( [[item_id]], [[planned_maintenance_date]] , FALSE , TRUE , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,'Planned' ) RETURNING CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Add machine maintenance log entry for custom item into DB -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [21 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development --------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO transactions.machine_maintenance_log ( id, machine_id , machine_name , uc_id , loc_id , item_name , action_plan , planned_maintenance_date , actual_maintenance_date , maintenance_by , uploaded_files , period , remark , is_active , is_complete , status , created_at , item_id ) VALUES ( default, [[machine_id]] , [[machine_name]] , [[uc_id]] , [[loc_id]] , [[item_name]] , [[action_plan]] , [[planned_maintenance_date]] , [[actual_maintenance_date]] , [[maintenance_by]] , [[uploaded_files]] , 'Custom' , [[remark]] , TRUE , [[is_complete]] , [[status]] , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , [[item_id]] ) RETURNING item_id;

INSERT INTO transactions.operator_feedback ( id, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, "start", "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", is_active, username, issue_id, last_updated_by, planned_downtime, machine_status_down ) VALUES ( default, [[operatorId]], [[machineId]], [[locId]], [[ucId]], [[machineStatusId]], [[startTime]], [[endTime]], [[feedback]], COALESCE([[remark]],''), [[timestamp]], true, [[username]], CASE WHEN ([[source_id]]= 0) THEN COALESCE((SELECT MAX(id)+1 from transactions.operator_feedback ),0) ELSE COALESCE([[source_id]],0) END, [[lastUpdatedBy]], [[plannedDowntime]], [[status_down]] ) RETURNING id;

select id from transactions.operator_feedback where "start" < coalesce([[new_end_date]],'9999-01-01'::timestamp) and coalesce("end",'9999-01-01'::timestamp) > [[new_start_date]] and machine_id = [[machineId]] and loc_id = [[locId]] and uc_id = [[ucId]] and is_active = true and id != coalesce([[feedbackId]],0) limit 1
select distinct status_date as week from transactions.tut_daily order by status_date desc
select distinct period_start as week from transactions.uee_daily order by period_start desc

--========================================= -- QUERY TO DELETE DEL DUPLICATE DATA --=========================================
WITH same_data AS ( select id, machine_status_raw_id, machine_id, act_status, start_date, LAG(act_status,1) OVER ( PARTITION BY machine_id, loc_id, uc_id order by start_date ) next_act_status from transactions.machine_status WHERE start_date BETWEEN ([[start_date]]::timestamp - interval '1 hour') AND [[end_date]]::timestamp ) delete from transactions.machine_status where id in (select id from same_data where act_status = next_act_status and start_date BETWEEN [[start_date]]::timestamp AND [[end_date]]::timestamp);
DELETE FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE id = [[id]]
DELETE FROM transactions.user_maintenance_operator_suggestion_list WHERE username = [[username]] AND created_at < [[min_created_at]];
UPDATE transactions.operator_feedback SET is_active=false, username=[[username]] WHERE id=[[feedbackId]];
DELETE FROM transactions.shiftv2 WHERE id=[[shift_id]]
DELETE FROM transactions.shiftv2 WHERE shiftplan_id=[[shiftplan_id]]
DELETE FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 WHERE id=[[shiftplan_id]]
DELETE FROM transactions.energy_tarrifs WHERE id=[[Config_ID]]
DELETE FROM transactions.energy_email_config WHERE id=[[Config_ID]]

WITH machineStatusData as ( with combineData as ( select * from ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, (case when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when end_date is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else end_date end ) as end_date, act_status as status_id, '2000-01-01' as "timestamp" from transactions.machine_status as m where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] union
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date, status_id, "timestamp" from transactions.operator_feedback where
( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and status_id = '1004' and is_active = true ) as combined_data order by start_date ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from combineData union select machine_id, end_date from combineData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates ), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.status_id, D.start_time, D.end_time from combineData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id as act_status, (case when status_id='1001' then 'Idle' when status_id='1002' then 'Air Cut' when status_id='1003' then 'Cutting' when status_id='1000' then 'Idle' when status_id='1004' then 'Down' when status_id='1005' then 'Idle' end ) as status, min(start_time) as start_date, max(end_time) as end_date -- grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_time) as grp from ( select timestamp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, start_time, end_time, case when coalesce(lag(end_time) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_time), start_time) <> start_time then 1 end rst from machineStatusData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, status order by machine_id, start_date

WITH getBoundValueAndPIC AS ( SELECT mpm.machine_id , mpm.id AS rtmp_master_id , mpm.upper_bound , mpm.lower_bound , STRING_AGG(ulm.name, ', ') AS pic , mpm.message FROM transactions.machine_parameter_master AS mpm LEFT JOIN transactions.rtmp_master_pic_relation AS rmpr ON mpm.id = rmpr.rtmp_master_id LEFT JOIN transactions.user_list_master AS ulm ON rmpr.pic_id = ulm.id WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) GROUP BY mpm.machine_id , mpm.id , mpm.machine_name , mpm.parameter_name , mpm.upper_bound , mpm.lower_bound , mpm.message ORDER BY mpm.machine_id ASC , mpm.id ASC )
SELECT A.machine_id , A.parameter_name , A.parameter_value , CASE WHEN A.parameter_value > B.upper_bound THEN 'Upper Bound' WHEN A.parameter_value < B.lower_bound THEN 'Lower Bound' END AS exceed , CASE WHEN A.parameter_value > B.upper_bound THEN B.upper_bound WHEN A.parameter_value < B.lower_bound THEN B.lower_bound END AS bound_value , B.pic , B.message , A.timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters AS A INNER JOIN getBoundValueAndPIC AS B ON A.machine_id = B. machine_id AND A.parameter_id = B.rtmp_master_id WHERE A.machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND A.timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND A.timestamp < [[end_date]] AND (A.parameter_value > B.upper_bound OR A.parameter_value < B.lower_bound) ORDER BY A.machine_id ASC , A.parameter_name ASC , A.timestamp ASC;

--========================================= -- QUERY TO FIX END_DATE DATA AND CLOSE --========================================= WITH select_lead AS ( SELECT id, machine_status_raw_id, machine_id, act_status, start_date, LEAD(start_date,1) OVER ( PARTITION BY machine_id, loc_id, uc_id ORDER BY start_date ) next_start_date, LEAD(id,1) OVER ( PARTITION BY machine_id, loc_id, uc_id ORDER BY start_date ) next_id FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE start_date >= [[start_date]]::timestamp ) UPDATE transactions.machine_status ms SET end_date = sl.next_start_date, id_close = sl.next_id, duration = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM sl.next_start_date - ms.start_date) FROM select_lead sl where ms.id = sl.id and ms.start_date BETWEEN [[start_date]]::timestamp AND [[end_date]]::timestamp;
SELECT name,email FROM transactions.user_list_master WHERE role = 'Supervisor' AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] AND uc_id = [[uc_id]] AND displayed_on_screen LIKE '%RTMPM%' ORDER BY name ASC;
select distinct period_start from transactions.energy_by_machine_group_pct where period_type=[[DBtimeframe]] order by period_start desc

SELECT pct.* FROM transactions.energy_by_machine_group_pct pct JOIN transactions.machine_groups mg ON pct.machine_group = mg.machine_group JOIN transactions.machine_types mt ON mg.machine_type_id = mt.id WHERE (mt.machine_type = [[SelectedMachineType]] OR [[SelectedMachineType]] IS null) AND pct.period_type = [[DBtimeframe]] AND pct.period_start = [[UTCDate]] AND pct.uc_id = [[uc_id]]

WITH machine_type_mapping AS ( SELECT DISTINCT machine_group, CASE WHEN machine_group IN ('CNC Contouring', 'CNC Turning', 'CNC EDM Cutting') THEN 'CNC' WHEN machine_group IN ('Tempering Furnace', 'Vacuum Furnace', 'Nitriding Furnace') THEN 'Furnace' WHEN machine_group IN ('Medium Twin-Headed Milling', 'Big Face Milling') THEN 'Milling' WHEN machine_group IN ('Surface Grinding') THEN 'Grinding' WHEN machine_group IN ('Round Piece Machine', 'Small Size Machine', 'Medium Size Machine') THEN 'Sawing' END AS machine_type FROM transactions.energy_by_machine_group_pct ), machine_type_totals AS ( SELECT mtm.machine_type, SUM(t.machine_group_energy_used) AS machine_type_energy FROM transactions.energy_by_machine_group_pct t JOIN machine_type_mapping mtm ON t.machine_group = mtm.machine_group WHERE mtm.machine_type IS NOT NULL AND period_type=[[periodtype]] AND period_start=[[periodstart]] AND uc_id=[[uc_id]] GROUP BY mtm.machine_type ), grand_total AS ( SELECT SUM(machine_type_energy) AS total_all_energy FROM machine_type_totals ) SELECT mtt.machine_type, mtt.machine_type_energy, ROUND(100.0 * mtt.machine_type_energy / gt.total_all_energy, 2) AS percentage_of_total FROM machine_type_totals mtt CROSS JOIN grand_total gt ORDER BY mtt.machine_type_energy DESC;

SELECT e.*, CASE -- If Machine Group is selected → percentage within machine group WHEN [[machineGroups]] IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN SUM(e.machine_id_energy_used) OVER ( PARTITION BY e.period_type, e.period_start, mg.machine_group ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( e.machine_id_energy_used * 100.0 / SUM(e.machine_id_energy_used) OVER ( PARTITION BY e.period_type, e.period_start, mg.machine_group ), 2 ) END -- If only Machine Type selected → use original percentage from source table ELSE e.machine_id_percentage END AS machine_id_percentage_display
FROM transactions.energy_by_machine_id_pct e INNER JOIN transactions.machine_mgroup_mapping m ON e.machine_id = m.machine_id INNER JOIN transactions.machine_groups mg ON m.machine_group_id = mg.id INNER JOIN transactions.machine_types mt ON mg.machine_type_id = mt.id WHERE ( ( [[machineGroups]] IS NOT NULL AND mg.machine_group = [[machineGroups]] ) OR ( [[machineGroups]] IS NULL AND mt.machine_type = [[machineType]] ) ) AND e.period_type = [[periodType]] AND e.period_start = [[periodStart]] ORDER BY machine_id_percentage_display ASC;
select * from transactions.energy_daily where

SELECT date_trunc('hour', open_date) AS open_date_ts, to_char( date_trunc('hour', open_date), 'Mon DD HH12 AM' ) AS open_date, SUM(total_used_energy) AS total_used_energy, SUM(tarrif) AS tarrif FROM transactions.energy_hourly WHERE machine_id IN (<<machine_id>>) AND open_date >= [[start_date]] GROUP BY open_date_ts -- ORDER BY open_date_ts limit 25

SELECT
-- uc_id, -- ADDED: Required for the merge script -- loc_id, -- ADDED: Required for the merge script period_start AS open_date_ts, ROUND(AVG(perc_1003::numeric), 2) AS utilization FROM transactions.uee_hourly WHERE loc_id = [[locId]] AND uc_id = [[ucId]] AND machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) AND period_start >= [[periodStart]] GROUP BY period_start -- machine_id, uc_id, loc_id, -- FIXED: Must group by ALL non-aggregated columns ORDER BY period_start -- limit 25 --<-- Commented out: Be careful with limits in production reports!

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Get item list from DB -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [15 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development --------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT DISTINCT(item_name) AS item_name FROM transactions.machine_maintenance_master WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] AND uc_id = [[uc_id]] ORDER BY item_name ASC;
SELECT username, created_at FROM transactions.user_maintenance_operator_suggestion_list WHERE username = [[username]] ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100;

SELECT message->>'t' AS LatestRecord FROM transactions.machine_data_raw_dt where message ->> 'id' like '_AdvancedTags.2371-626-%-Machine_Status' -- All Machines with 2371 and 626 i.e ADG ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT message->>'t' AS LatestRecord FROM transactions.machine_data_raw_dt where message ->> 'id' like '_AdvancedTags.2374-834-%-Machine_Status' -- All Machines with 2374 and 834 i.e Fukuroi Japan ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT message->>'t' AS LatestRecord FROM transactions.machine_data_raw_dt where message ->> 'id' like '_AdvancedTags.2379-605-%-Machine_Status' -- All Machines with 2379 and 605 i.e Singapore ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT message->'payload'->'machine_state'->'timestamp' as payload FROM transactions.machine_data_raw_rt WHERE message ->> 'ucid' = '2323' AND ( (message -> 'payload' -> 'machine_state' ->> 'timestamp')::timestamp >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes') ) ORDER BY (message -> 'payload' -> 'machine_state' ->> 'timestamp') desc limit 1

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Get machine maintenance historical data from DB -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [08 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development -- [DONE] [10 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added index/id to the Output -- [DONE] [14 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added itemNameList, periodList, isCompleteList, and statusList as Input Parameter --------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY machine_name ASC, item_name ASC, planned_maintenance_date ASC) AS id , machine_id , machine_name , item_id , item_name , action_plan , period , planned_maintenance_date , actual_maintenance_date , maintenance_by , status , uploaded_files , remark , is_complete FROM transactions.machine_maintenance_log WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) -- AND loc_id = [[locID]] -- AND uc_id = [[ucID]] AND planned_maintenance_date >= [[selected_start_date]] AND planned_maintenance_date <= [[selected_end_date]] AND item_name IN (<<itemNameList>>) -- AND period IN (<<periodList>>) AND is_complete IN (<<isCompleteList>>) -- AND status IN (<<statusList>>) -- AND is_active = TRUE;

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Get machine maintenance historical data if custom item is selected from DB -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [16 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development --------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY machine_name ASC, item_name ASC, planned_maintenance_date ASC) AS id , machine_id , machine_name , item_id , item_name , action_plan , period , planned_maintenance_date , actual_maintenance_date , maintenance_by , status , uploaded_files , remark , is_complete FROM transactions.machine_maintenance_log WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) -- AND loc_id = [[locID]] -- AND uc_id = [[ucID]] AND planned_maintenance_date >= [[selected_start_date]] AND planned_maintenance_date <= [[selected_end_date]] AND is_complete IN (<<isCompleteList>>) AND status IN (<<statusList>>) AND is_active = TRUE -- AND ((item_name IN (<<itemNameList>>) -- AND period IN (<<periodList>>)) OR period = 'Custom');
SELECT machine_id, id, parameter_name, parameter_desc FROM transactions.machine_parameter_master WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND status = 'Showed' ORDER BY machine_id ASC, id ASC;

SELECT s_1001, s_1002, s_1003, s_1004 FROM transactions.get_planned_machine_time_for_status1( '2025-07-01', -- start_date '2025-07-30', -- end_date true, -- some flag parameter CAST('2371' AS INT), -- uc_id? CAST('626' AS INT), -- loc_id? 'S_S41' -- machine_id (?) ) AS ( s_1001 INTEGER, s_1002 INTEGER, s_1003 INTEGER, s_1004 INTEGER );

select v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 FROM transactions.uee_weekly where week =[[starttime]] and uc_id=[[ucId]] and loc_id=[[locId]] and machine_group=[[machineGroup]] and machine_id=[[machineId]]

SELECT start_date, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS month_of_entry, 13 - EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS months_with_data FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE machine_id = [[machineId]] AND loc_id = [[locId]]::int AND uc_id = [[ucId]]::int ORDER BY start_date ASC LIMIT 1;

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( --SELECT * FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]] ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 )
UNION
SELECT [[machine_id]] , [[parameter_id]] , 'dummy' , 0 , '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) --ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ),
combinedData AS ( ( SELECT * FROM prevData
UNION
SELECT * FROM selectedData ) ORDER BY timestamp ASC )
SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , GENERATE_SERIES(timestamp, next_timestamp - interval '1 Seconds', <<intervalMinutes>>) AS timestamp FROM ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp , COALESCE(LEAD(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC), [[end_date]]) AS next_timestamp FROM combinedData ) AS A

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT 0 AS id , machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]]
UNION
SELECT [[machine_id]] , [[parameter_id]] , 'dummy' , 0 , '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT id , machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ),
combinedData AS ( ( SELECT * FROM prevData
UNION
SELECT * FROM selectedData ) ORDER BY timestamp ASC ),
preparedData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , GENERATE_SERIES(timestamp, next_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 Seconds', (CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM next_timestamp - timestamp) - 1) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM next_timestamp - timestamp) - 1) END)::text::interval) AS timestamp FROM ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp , COALESCE(LEAD(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC), [[end_date]]) AS next_timestamp FROM combinedData ) AS A )
SELECT * FROM preparedData ORDER BY timestamp

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT 0 AS id , machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]]
UNION
SELECT [[machine_id]] , [[parameter_id]] , 'dummy' , 0 , '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT id , machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ),
combinedData AS ( ( SELECT * FROM prevData
UNION
SELECT * FROM selectedData ) ORDER BY timestamp ASC ),
preparedData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , GENERATE_SERIES(timestamp, next_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 Seconds', (CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM next_timestamp - timestamp) - 1) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM next_timestamp - timestamp) - 1) END)::text::interval) AS timestamp FROM ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp , COALESCE(LEAD(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC), [[end_date]]) AS next_timestamp FROM combinedData ) AS A )
SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , GENERATE_SERIES(timestamp, next_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 Seconds', <<intervalMinutes>>) AS timestamp FROM ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp , COALESCE(LEAD(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC), [[end_date]]) AS next_timestamp FROM preparedData ) AS A

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]]
UNION
SELECT [[machine_id]] , [[parameter_id]] , 'dummy' , 0 , '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ),
unionData AS ( SELECT * FROM prevData
UNION
SELECT * FROM selectedData )
SELECT A.machine_id , A.parameter_id , A.parameter_name , AVG(A.parameter_value) as parameter_value , DR::timestamp AS timestamp FROM unionData AS A CROSS JOIN GENERATE_SERIES([[start_date]]::timestamp, [[end_date]]::timestamp - INTERVAL <<intervalMinutes>>, <<intervalMinutes>>) AS DR WHERE A.timestamp >= DR::timestamp AND A.timestamp < (DR + INTERVAL <<intervalMinutes>>)::timestamp GROUP BY A.machine_id , A.parameter_id , A.parameter_name , DR::timestamp , (DR + INTERVAL <<intervalMinutes>>)::timestamp ORDER BY DR::timestamp;

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT 0 AS id , machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]]
UNION
SELECT [[machine_id]] , [[parameter_id]] , 'dummy' , 0 , '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT id , machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ),
combinedData AS ( ( SELECT * FROM prevData
UNION
SELECT * FROM selectedData ) ORDER BY timestamp ASC ),
maxVal AS ( SELECT MAX(parameter_value) AS maxValue FROM combinedData ),
filteredData AS ( SELECT combinedData.* , LAG(parameter_value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC) AS last_value , LAG(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC) AS last_timestamp , maxVal.maxValue AS max_value FROM combinedData, maxVal ),
preparedData AS ( SELECT * FROM filteredData WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT id FROM filteredData WHERE (ABS(last_value - parameter_value) <= 1 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM timestamp - last_timestamp) <= 10 AND max_value >= 100) OR (ABS(last_value - parameter_value) <= 0.01 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM timestamp - last_timestamp) <= 10 AND max_value < 100) ) )
SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM preparedData

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT 0 AS id, machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]] UNION SELECT [[machine_id]], [[parameter_id]], 'dummy', 0, '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT id, machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ),
combinedData AS ( ( SELECT * FROM prevData UNION SELECT * FROM selectedData ) ORDER BY timestamp ASC ),
maxVal AS ( SELECT MAX(parameter_value) AS maxValue FROM combinedData ),
filteredData AS ( SELECT *, LAG(parameter_value, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC) AS last_value, LAG(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC) AS last_timestamp, maxVal.maxValue AS max_value FROM combinedData, maxVal ),
preparedData AS ( SELECT * FROM filteredData WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT id FROM filteredData WHERE (ABS(last_value - parameter_value) <= 1 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM timestamp - last_timestamp) <= 10 AND max_value >= 100) ) ),
preparedData2 AS ( SELECT machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, GENERATE_SERIES(timestamp, next_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 Seconds', (CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM next_timestamp - timestamp) - 1) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM next_timestamp - timestamp) - 1) END)::text::interval) AS timestamp FROM ( SELECT machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, timestamp, COALESCE(LEAD(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC), [[end_date]]) AS next_timestamp FROM preparedData ) AS A )
SELECT machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, GENERATE_SERIES(timestamp, next_timestamp - INTERVAL '1 Seconds', <<intervalMinutes>>) AS timestamp FROM ( SELECT machine_id, parameter_id, parameter_name, parameter_value, timestamp, COALESCE(LEAD(timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id, parameter_id ORDER BY timestamp ASC), [[end_date]]) AS next_timestamp FROM preparedData2 ) AS A;

WITH prevData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , [[start_date]]::timestamp AS timestamp FROM ( ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp < [[start_date]]
UNION
SELECT [[machine_id]] , [[parameter_id]] , 'dummy' , 0 , '1900-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp ) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS B ),
selectedData AS ( SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] )
( SELECT * FROM prevData
UNION
SELECT * FROM selectedData ) ORDER BY timestamp ASC

SELECT machine_id , parameter_id , parameter_name , parameter_value , timestamp FROM transactions.machine_parameters WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND parameter_id = [[parameter_id]] AND timestamp >= [[start_date]] AND timestamp < [[end_date]] ORDER BY timestamp ASC

SELECT mpm.machine_id , mpm.id AS rtmp_master_id , mpm.machine_name , mpm.parameter_name , mpm.unit , mpm.parameter_desc , mpm.status , mpm.upper_bound , mpm.lower_bound -- , STRING_AGG(ulm.name, ', ') AS pic ,mpm.pic , mpm.message FROM transactions.machine_parameter_master AS mpm LEFT JOIN transactions.rtmp_master_pic_relation AS rmpr ON mpm.id = rmpr.rtmp_master_id LEFT JOIN transactions.user_list_master AS ulm ON rmpr.pic_id = ulm.id WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) GROUP BY mpm.machine_id , mpm.id , mpm.machine_name , mpm.parameter_name , mpm.unit , mpm.parameter_desc , mpm.status , mpm.upper_bound , mpm.lower_bound , mpm.message ORDER BY mpm.machine_name ASC , mpm.machine_id ASC , mpm.id ASC;
SELECT * FROM transactions.get_machines_running_hours_for_time_frame1( [[startTime]], [[endTime]], [[ucId]], [[locId]], array[<<machineIdList>>] );
SELECT machine_id , id , lower_bound , upper_bound FROM transactions.machine_parameter_master WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND id = [[parameter_id]];

SELECT status_date::date AS open_date_ts,
SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1001, 0)) AS idle, SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1002, 0)) AS aircut, SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1003, 0)) AS running, SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1004, 0)) AS down,
CASE WHEN ( SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1001, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1002, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1003, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1004, 0)) ) > 0 THEN ROUND( SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1003, 0)) * 100.0 / ( SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1001, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1002, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1003, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(v_status_time_1004, 0)) ), 2 ) ELSE 0 END AS utilization
from transactions.tut_daily
WHERE loc_id = [[locId]] AND uc_id = [[ucId]] AND machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) AND status_date > [[periodStart]]
GROUP BY status_date::date ORDER BY open_date_ts;
select transactions.get_working_time1([[startTime]], [[endTime]], [[onlyDate]], [[ucId]],[[locId]], [[machineGroup]], [[machineId]]);
INSERT INTO transactions.energy_threshold_config (uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, power_warning) VALUES ([[UC_ID]],[[Loc_ID]],[[Machine_ID]],[[Power_Warning]])
INSERT INTO transactions.energy_config (uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, v, pf1, pf2, pf3) VALUES ([[UC_ID]],[[Loc_ID]],[[Machine_ID]],[[Voltage]],[[PF1]],[[PF2]],[[PF3]])
INSERT INTO transactions.holidaycalendar (uc_id, loc_id, holiday_name, holiday_date) VALUES ([[uc_id]], [[loc_id]], [[holiday_name]], [[holiday_date]])

INSERT INTO transactions.shiftv2 (name, start_time, end_time, weekday, shiftplan_id, timezoneoffset, daylightsavingtimeactive, hasDayLightSavingTime) VALUES([[shift_name]], [[start_time]], [[end_time]], [[weekday]], [[shiftplan_id]], [[timezoneoffset]], [[daylightsavingtimeactive]], [[hasDayLightSavingTime]])
INSERT INTO transactions.shiftplanv2 (uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date, machine_id) VALUES([[uc_id]], [[loc_id]], [[machine_group]], [[start_date]], [[end_date]], [[machine_id]])
INSERT INTO transactions.energy_email_config (uc_id,loc_id,email,active,machine_type) VALUES ([[UC_ID]],[[Loc_ID]],[[Email]],[[Active]],[[Machine_Type]])
INSERT INTO transactions.energy_tarrif_desc (key,amount,currency,loc_id,uc_id ) VALUES ((UPPER([[Key]]))::tariff_key_enum,[[Amount]],UPPER([[Currency]]),[[Loc_ID]],[[UC_ID]])

INSERT INTO transactions.energy_tarrifs (loc_id,uc_id,start_date,end_date,start_time,end_time,tarrif_desc_id) VALUES ([[Loc_ID]],[[UC_ID]],[[Start_Date]]::date,[[End_Date]]::date,[[Start_Time]]::time,[[End_Time]]::time,[[Tariff_Desc_ID]])

INSERT INTO transactions.energy_power_warning_log (uc_id,loc_id,machine_id,power_reading,power_threshold,recorded_at) VALUES ([[UC_ID]],[[Loc_ID]],[[Machine_ID]],[[Power_Reading]],[[Power_Threshold]], NOW())

INSERT INTO transactions.rtmp_master_pic_relation ( rtmp_master_id, pic_id ) SELECT [[parameter_id]] AS parameter_id, id FROM transactions.user_list_master WHERE name = [[pic_name]] AND role = 'Supervisor' RETURNING rtmp_master_id;

WITH todays_machines AS ( SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE start_date >= CURRENT_DATE AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] AND uc_id = [[uc_id]] ), machines_with_null_end AS ( SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE end_date IS NULL AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] AND uc_id = [[uc_id]] ) SELECT DISTINCT ON (ms.machine_id) ms.machine_id, ms.start_date, ms.end_date FROM transactions.machine_status ms LEFT JOIN todays_machines tm ON tm.machine_id = ms.machine_id LEFT JOIN machines_with_null_end nulls ON nulls.machine_id = ms.machine_id WHERE ms.start_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND ms.start_date < CURRENT_DATE AND ms.end_date < (CURRENT_DATE - 1) + time '23:59:00' AND tm.machine_id IS NULL -- exclude machines with records today AND nulls.machine_id IS NULL -- exclude machines with any null end_date AND ms.loc_id = [[loc_id]] AND ms.uc_id = [[uc_id]] ORDER BY ms.machine_id, ms.start_date DESC;

SELECT machine_id ,act_status ,SUM(duration) AS SUMs FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE start_date >= [[startDate]] AND end_date <= [[endDate]] AND machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) GROUP BY machine_id ,act_status
SELECT sum(duration) AS sum, act_status FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIds>>) AND start_date >= [[start]] AND end_date <= [[end]] GROUP BY act_status
select distinct month_start as week from transactions.tut_Monthly order by month_start desc

-- select distinct period_start as week -- from transactions.uee_monthly -- order by period_start desc
select distinct period_start as week from transactions.uee_monthly
order by period_start desc
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_hourly WHERE machine_id IN (<<machine_id>>)AND uc_id=[[ucId]] AND loc_id=[[locId]] AND (open_date>=[[Start_Time]] AND open_date<[[End_Time]]) ORDER BY open_date ASC
select distinct quarter_start as week from transactions.tut_quarterly order by quarter_start desc
select distinct period_start as week from transactions.uee_quarterly order by period_start desc
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_email_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_type=[[Machine_Type]] AND Active='true' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (alarm_code) CASE WHEN alarm_code LIKE 'M%' AND alarm_code != 'MAINTENANCE' THEN 'C' || alarm_code ELSE alarm_code END AS dropdown_id , alarm_description as dropdown_value FROM transactions.alarm_list_master WHERE (alarm_code LIKE ('C%') OR alarm_code LIKE ('M%') OR alarm_code IN ('TRIGGERED','MAINTENANCE')) AND machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) ) AS alarm_list_master ORDER BY dropdown_id;
SELECT DISTINCT ON (machine_id) * FROM transactions.energy_data WHERE recorded_at>[[Time_Stamp]] ORDER BY machine_id ASC, recorded_at DESC
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_threshold_config --WHERE --uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND --loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] ORDER BY machine_id ASC

SELECT loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , feedback , (CASE WHEN "start" < [[selected_start_date]] THEN [[selected_start_date]] ELSE "start" END )::timestamp AS start_date , (CASE WHEN "end" > [[selected_end_date]] THEN [[selected_end_date]] WHEN "end" IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() THEN [[selected_end_date]] ELSE NOW() END ) ELSE "end" END )::timestamp AS end_date FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE ("end" > [[selected_start_date]] OR "end" IS NULL) AND "start" < [[selected_end_date]] AND [[selected_start_date]] < NOW() AND is_active IS TRUE AND status_id = '1004' ORDER BY machine_id ASC , feedback ASC;
SELECT etd.currency AS result FROM transactions.energy_tarrifs et LEFT JOIN transactions.energy_tarrif_desc etd ON et.tarrif_desc_id=etd.id WHERE etd.uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND etd.loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_data WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND Machine_ID=[[Machine_ID]] AND recorded_at>[[Time_Stamp]] ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT ON (machine_id) * FROM transactions.energy_data WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND recorded_at>[[Time_Stamp]] ORDER BY machine_id ASC, recorded_at DESC
select * from transactions.energy_daily WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id = [[Machine_ID]] AND (day_start>=[[Start_Time]] AND day_start<[[End_Time]]) ORDER BY day_start ASC
SELECT DISTINCT currency FROM transactions.energy_tarrif_desc WHERE key=[[Key]]::tariff_key_enum AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND uc_id=[[UC_ID]]
SELECT DISTINCT key FROM transactions.energy_tarrif_desc WHERE loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND uc_id=[[UC_ID]]

WITH combinedData as ( WITH downtimeData as ( select timestamp, loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, feedback, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date from transactions.operator_feedback as m where ( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and is_active is true and status_id = '1004' and feedback in (<<downtimeReason>>)
union
select '2000-01-01' as timestamp, loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, feedback, start_date, end_date from ( select loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, alarm_code as feedback, act_status, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, -- (case -- when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] -- when end_date is null then -- (case -- when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] -- else NOW() -- end -- ) -- else end_date -- end -- ) as end_date (case when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date)>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date)<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date) is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end) else lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date) end ) as end_date from transactions.alarm_status_log as al where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] -- and act_status is true and alarm_type = 'Critical Alarm' and alarm_code in (<<downtimeReason>>) ) as data where act_status is true ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from downtimeData union select machine_id, end_date from downtimeData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates
), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.feedback, D.start_time, D.end_time from downtimeData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
SELECT machine_id, count (machine_id) as total_occurence, EXTRACT (epoch from sum(end_time::timestamp - start_time::timestamp )) as total_duration FROM ( select machine_id, feedback, min(start_time) as start_time, max(end_time) as end_time, grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_time) as grp from ( select timestamp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, feedback, start_time, end_time, case when coalesce(lag(end_time) over (partition by machine_id order by feedback, machine_id, start_time), start_time) <> start_time then 1 end rst from combinedData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, machine_id, feedback order by machine_id, start_time ) as resultData group by machine_id order by machine_id asc

WITH combinedData as ( WITH downtimeData as ( select timestamp, loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, feedback, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date from transactions.operator_feedback as m where ( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and is_active is true and status_id = '1004' and feedback in (<<downtimeReason>>)
union
select '2000-01-01' as timestamp, loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, feedback, start_date, end_date from ( select loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, alarm_code as feedback, act_status, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, -- (case -- when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] -- when end_date is null then -- (case -- when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] -- else NOW() -- end -- ) -- else end_date -- end -- ) as end_date (case when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date)>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date)<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date) is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end) else lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id, alarm_code order by start_date) end ) as end_date from transactions.alarm_status_log as al where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] -- and act_status is true and alarm_type = 'Critical Alarm' and alarm_code in (<<downtimeReason>>) ) as data where act_status is true ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from downtimeData union select machine_id, end_date from downtimeData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates
), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.feedback, D.start_time, D.end_time from downtimeData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
SELECT feedback, count (feedback) as total_occurence, EXTRACT (epoch from sum(end_time::timestamp - start_time::timestamp )) as total_duration FROM ( select machine_id, feedback, min(start_time) as start_time, max(end_time) as end_time, grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_time) as grp from ( select timestamp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, feedback, start_time, end_time, case when coalesce(lag(end_time) over (partition by machine_id order by feedback, machine_id, start_time), start_time) <> start_time then 1 end rst from combinedData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, machine_id, feedback order by machine_id, start_time ) as resultData group by feedback

WITH combinedData AS ( WITH downtimeData AS ( SELECT timestamp , loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , feedback , (CASE WHEN "start" < [[selected_start_date]] THEN [[selected_start_date]] ELSE "start" END )::timestamp AS start_date , (CASE WHEN "end" > [[selected_end_date]] THEN [[selected_end_date]] WHEN "end" IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() THEN [[selected_end_date]] ELSE NOW() END ) ELSE "end" END )::timestamp AS end_date FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE ("end" > [[selected_start_date]] OR "end" IS NULL) AND "start" < [[selected_end_date]] AND [[selected_start_date]] < NOW() AND machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND is_active IS TRUE AND status_id = '1004' AND feedback IN (<<downtimeReason>>)
UNION
SELECT '2000-02-01' AS timestamp , loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , mode AS feedback , (CASE WHEN start_date < [[selected_start_date]] THEN [[selected_start_date]] ELSE start_date END )::timestamp AS start_date , (CASE WHEN end_date > [[selected_end_date]] THEN [[selected_end_date]] WHEN end_date IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() THEN [[selected_end_date]] ELSE NOW() END ) ELSE end_date END )::timestamp AS end_date FROM transactions.emergency_functional_data WHERE (end_date > [[selected_start_date]] OR end_date IS NULL) AND start_date < [[selected_end_date]] AND [[selected_start_date]] < NOW() AND mode IN ('MAINTENANCE', 'TRIGGERED') AND type IN ('Emergency Stop', 'Functional Mode') AND machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND mode IN (<<downtimeReason>>)
UNION
SELECT '2000-01-01' AS timestamp , loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , alarm_code AS feedback , (CASE WHEN start_date < [[selected_start_date]] THEN [[selected_start_date]] ELSE start_date END )::timestamp AS start_date , (CASE WHEN end_date > [[selected_end_date]] THEN [[selected_end_date]] WHEN end_date IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() THEN [[selected_end_date]] ELSE NOW() END ) ELSE end_date END )::timestamp AS end_date FROM transactions.alarm_status_log WHERE (end_date > [[selected_start_date]] OR end_date IS NULL) AND start_date < [[selected_end_date]] AND [[selected_start_date]] < NOW() AND machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND is_down = TRUE AND alarm_code IN (<<downtimeReason>>) ),
ValidDates AS ( SELECT machine_id , start_date AS Date FROM downtimeData
UNION
SELECT machine_id , end_date FROM downtimeData ),
ValidDateRanges1 AS ( SELECT machine_id , Date as start_date , LEAD(Date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY Date) AS end_date FROM ValidDates ),
ValidDateRanges AS ( SELECT machine_id , start_date , end_date FROM ValidDateRanges1 WHERE end_date IS NOT NULL )
SELECT DISTINCT ON (machine_id, start_date, end_date) E.timestamp , E.uc_id , E.loc_id , E.machine_id , E.feedback AS reason , D.start_date , D.end_date FROM downtimeData AS E INNER JOIN ValidDateRanges AS D ON E.machine_id = D.machine_id AND (E.end_date > D.start_date AND E.start_date < D.end_date) ORDER BY machine_id ASC , start_date ASC , end_date ASC , timestamp DESC )
SELECT DATE(start_date) AS timestamp , SUM(total_occurrence) AS total_occurrence , SUM(total_duration) AS total_duration FROM ( SELECT loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , reason , DATE([[selected_start_date]]::timestamp) AS start_date , DATE([[selected_end_date]]::timestamp) AS end_date , COUNT(*) AS total_occurrence , EXTRACT (EPOCH FROM SUM(end_date::timestamp - start_date::timestamp )) AS total_duration FROM ( SELECT loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , reason , MIN(start_date) AS start_date , MAX(end_date) AS end_date , grp FROM ( SELECT * , SUM(rst) OVER (ORDER BY machine_id, start_date) AS grp FROM ( SELECT timestamp , loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , reason , start_date , end_date , CASE WHEN COALESCE(LAG(end_date) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY reason, machine_id, start_date), start_date) <> start_date THEN 1 END AS rst FROM combinedData ) AS t1 ) AS t2 GROUP BY grp , loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , reason ORDER BY loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , reason , start_date ) AS resultData GROUP BY loc_id , uc_id , machine_id , reason ) AS resultData2 GROUP BY DATE(start_date)

WITH combinedData as ( WITH downtimeData as ( select timestamp, loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, status_id, feedback, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date from transactions.operator_feedback as m where ( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and is_active is true and status_id = '1004' and feedback = [[downtimeReason]] ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from downtimeData union select machine_id, end_date from downtimeData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates
), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.status_id, E.feedback, D.start_time, D.end_time from downtimeData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
SELECT machine_id, feedback, EXTRACT (epoch from sum(end_time::timestamp - start_time::timestamp )) as total_duration FROM combinedData group by machine_id, feedback order by total_duration desc

SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_data WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]] AND (recorded_at>=[[Start_Time]] AND recorded_at<=[[End_Time]]) ORDER BY recorded_at ASC
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_threshold_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]] ORDER BY machine_id ASC
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_threshold_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] ORDER BY machine_id ASC

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('minute', created_at), 'Mon DD HH12:MI AM YYYY') AS created_at, ROUND(SUM(used_energy_calculated)::numeric, 2) AS used_energy FROM transactions.energy_data WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) AND created_at >= [[startDate]] AND created_at < [[endDate]] GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', created_at) ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', created_at) ASC;
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_email_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND email=[[Email]] AND machine_type=[[Machine_Type]] ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_email_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND (machine_type LIKE CASE WHEN ([[Machine_Type]] IS NOT NULL) THEN [[Machine_Type]] ELSE '%' END) ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]]
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_config WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]]

WITH feedbackData as ( with combineData as ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date, status_id, "timestamp" from transactions.operator_feedback where
( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and is_active = true and status_id = '1004' order by machine_id asc, start_date asc ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from combineData union select machine_id, end_date from combineData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates ), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, D.start_time as start_date, D.end_time as end_date, E.status_id, E.timestamp from combineData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, "timestamp" desc )
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, min(start_date) as start_date, max(end_date) as end_date, status_id, max("timestamp") as "timestamp" -- grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_date) as grp from ( select "timestamp", uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, start_date, end_date, case when coalesce(lag(end_date) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_date), start_date) <> start_date then 1 end rst from feedbackData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id order by machine_id, start_date

SELECT to_char("timestamp", 'Mon DD HH12:MI:SS AM YYYY') AS created_at, -- Added seconds property_value FROM transactions.machine_properties_log WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) AND property_name = [[property_name]] AND "timestamp" >= [[startDate]] AND "timestamp" < [[endDate]] ORDER BY "timestamp" ASC
SELECT * FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE id = [[id]] ORDER BY holiday_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE uc_id = [[uc_id]] AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] ORDER BY holiday_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND holiday_date > [[start_date]] AND holiday_date < [[end_date]] ORDER BY holiday_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id= [[loc_id]] AND holiday_date = [[holiday_day]] ORDER BY holiday_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND holiday_date < [[end_date]] ORDER BY holiday_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.holidaycalendar WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND holiday_date > [[start_date]] ORDER BY holiday_date

SELECT * --(total_power*tarrif) AS cost FROM transactions.energy_hourly WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id = [[Machine_ID]] AND (open_date>=[[Start_Time]] AND open_date<[[End_Time]]) ORDER BY open_date ASC
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_hourly WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND (open_date>=[[Start_Time]] AND open_date<[[End_Time]]) ORDER BY open_date ASC
SELECT total_power AS result FROM transactions.energy_data WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]] ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1

select * from transactions.total_alarm_list_mv where start_date >= [[selectedStartDate]] and start_date <= [[selectedEndDate]] and machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) and alarm_type IN (<<alarmTypeList>>) order by start_date desc
select * from transactions.machine_status_group4([[start_date]], [[end_date]], array[<<machineIdList>>], <<uc_id>>, <<loc_id>>) order by start_date

select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, start_date, end_date, status_id, timestamp from ( ( WITH machineStatusData as ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, (case when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when end_date is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else end_date end ) as end_date, act_status as status_id from transactions.machine_status as m where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] ) select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, min(start_date) as start_date, max(end_date) as end_date, status_id, '2000-01-01' as timestamp -- grp from ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, start_date, end_date, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_date) as grp from ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, start_date, end_date, case when coalesce(lag(end_date) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_date), start_date) <> start_date then 1 end rst from machineStatusData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id --order by machine_id, start_date ) union
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date, status_id, "timestamp" from transactions.operator_feedback where
( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and is_active = true ) as combined_data order by machine_id asc, start_date asc

select distinct on (machine_id) machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, act_status, (case when "act_status"='1000' then 'Idle' when "act_status"='1001' then 'Idle' when "act_status"='1002' then 'Running' when "act_status"='1003' then 'Running' when "act_status"='1004' then 'Down' when "act_status"='1005' then 'Idle' end ) as status, start_date, end_date from ( select machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, act_status, start_date, end_date, '2000-01-01' as "timestamp" from transactions.machine_status where machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and start_date <= NOW() and (end_date > NOW() or end_date is null)
union
select machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id as act_status, "start" as start_date, "end" as end_date, "timestamp" from transactions.operator_feedback where machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and "start" <= NOW() and ("end" > NOW() or "end" is null) and is_active is true ) as machineData order by machine_id asc, timestamp desc, start_date desc, end_date desc
select * from transactions.machine_status where machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) order by start_date desc

WITH machineStatusData as ( with combineData as ( select * from ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, (case when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when end_date is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else end_date end ) as end_date, act_status as status_id, '2000-01-01' as "timestamp" from transactions.machine_status as m where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] union
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date, status_id, "timestamp" from transactions.operator_feedback where
( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] and is_active = true ) as combined_data order by start_date ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from combineData union select machine_id, end_date from combineData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates ), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.status_id, D.start_time, D.end_time from combineData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id as act_status, (case WHEN machine_id IN ('S_S18','S_S20','S_S21','S_S23','S_S24','S_S25','S_S28','S_S29','S_S30','S_S31', 'S_S32','S_S33','S_S34','S_S35','S_S37','S_S38','S_S39','S_S40','S_S41','S_S42','S_S44','S_S43','S_S45','S_S46','S_S47') AND status_id = '1003' THEN 'Cutting' when status_id='1001' then 'Idle' when status_id='1002' then 'Air Cut' when status_id='1003' then 'Running' when status_id='1000' then 'Idle' when status_id='1004' then 'Down' when status_id='1005' then 'Idle' end ) as status, min(start_time) as start_date, max(end_time) as end_date -- grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_time) as grp from ( select timestamp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, start_time, end_time, case when coalesce(lag(end_time) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_time), start_time) <> start_time then 1 end rst from machineStatusData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, status order by machine_id, start_date

-- WITH machineStatusData as -- ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, -- (case -- when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] -- when end_date is null then -- (case -- when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] -- else NOW() -- end -- ) -- else end_date -- end -- ) as end_date, (case when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date)>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date)<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date) is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end) else lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date) end) as end_date, act_status as status_id from transactions.machine_status as m where ( (end_date > [[selected_start_date]] and end_date >= start_date) or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[loc_id]] and uc_id = [[uc_id]] -- ) -- select -- uc_id, -- loc_id, -- machine_id, -- min(start_date) as start_date, -- max(end_date) as end_date, -- status_id, -- '2000-01-01' as timestamp -- -- grp -- from ( -- select -- uc_id, -- loc_id, -- machine_id, -- status_id, -- start_date, -- end_date, -- sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_date) as grp -- from ( -- select -- uc_id, -- loc_id, -- machine_id, -- status_id, -- start_date, -- end_date, -- case -- when coalesce(lag(end_date) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_date), start_date) <> start_date then 1 -- end rst -- from machineStatusData -- ) t1 -- ) t2 -- group by grp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id order by machine_id asc, start_date asc

WITH machineStatusData AS ( SELECT uc_id , loc_id , machine_id , (CASE WHEN start_date < [[selected_start_date]] THEN [[selected_start_date]] ELSE start_date END )::timestamp AS start_date , (CASE WHEN LEAD(start_date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY start_date) > [[selected_end_date]] THEN [[selected_end_date]] WHEN LEAD(start_date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY start_date) < [[selected_start_date]] THEN [[selected_start_date]] WHEN LEAD(start_date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY start_date) IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() THEN [[selected_end_date]] ELSE NOW() END) ELSE LEAD(start_date, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY start_date) END)::timestamp AS end_date , CASE WHEN act_status='1002' THEN '1003' ELSE act_status END AS status_id FROM transactions.machine_status WHERE (end_date > [[selected_start_date]] OR end_date IS NULL) AND start_date < [[selected_end_date]] AND [[selected_start_date]] <NOW() AND machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] AND uc_id = [[uc_id]] )
SELECT uc_id , loc_id , machine_id , MIN(start_date) AS start_date , MAX(end_date) AS end_date , status_id FROM ( SELECT uc_id , loc_id , machine_id , start_date , end_date , status_id , SUM(rst) OVER (ORDER BY machine_id, start_date) AS grp FROM ( SELECT uc_id , loc_id , machine_id , start_date , end_date , status_id , (CASE WHEN COALESCE(LAG(end_date) OVER (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY status_id, machine_id, start_date), start_date) <> start_date THEN 1 END ) AS rst FROM machineStatusData ) t1 ) t2 WHERE status_id IN ('1002', '1003') GROUP BY grp , uc_id , loc_id , machine_id , status_id ORDER BY machine_id ASC , start_date ASC , end_date ASC;

SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_daily WHERE machine_id IN (<<Machine_ID>>) AND uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND (day_start>=[[Start_Time]] AND day_start<=[[End_Time]]) ORDER BY day_start ASC

SELECT id, issue_id AS source_id, issue_id::text AS source_id_str, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, (case when "start"<[[startTime]] then [[startTime]] else "start" end ) as "start", (case when "end">[[endTime]] then [[endTime]] when "end" is null then (case when [[endTime]] < NOW() then [[endTime]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", last_updated_by FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE -- ( -- ("start"<[[startTime]] AND ("end" >[[startTime]] OR "end" IS NULL) ) -- OR -- ("start">=[[startTime]] AND "start"<[[endTime]] AND ("end" >"start" OR"end" IS NULL) ) -- ) ("end" > [[startTime]] or "end" is null) AND ("start"<[[endTime]]) AND ([[startTime]]<NOW()) AND uc_id=[[ucId]] AND loc_id=[[locId]] AND is_active =true AND machine_id = [[machineId]] ORDER BY "timestamp";

SELECT id, issue_id as source_id, issue_id::text as source_id_str, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, "start" , "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", last_updated_by, plnned_downtime, machine_status_down FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE "timestamp">[[startTime]] and "timestamp" <[[endTime]] and is_active =true ORDER BY "timestamp";

SELECT id, issue_id as source_id, issue_id::text as source_id_str, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, "start" , "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", last_updated_by, planned_downtime, machine_status_down FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE id = [[feedbackId]] and is_active =true

SELECT id, issue_id AS source_id, issue_id::text AS source_id_str, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, (case when "start"<[[startTime]] then [[startTime]] else "start" end ) as "start", (case when "end">[[endTime]] then [[endTime]] when "end" is null then (case when [[endTime]] < NOW() then [[endTime]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", last_updated_by FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE -- ( -- ("start"<[[startTime]] AND ("end" >[[startTime]] OR "end" IS NULL) ) -- OR -- ("start">=[[startTime]] AND "start"<[[endTime]] AND ("end" >"start" OR"end" IS NULL) ) -- ) ("end" > [[startTime]] or "end" is null) and ("start"<[[endTime]]) and ([[startTime]]<NOW()) AND is_active =true ORDER BY "timestamp";

SELECT id, issue_id AS source_id, issue_id::text AS source_id_str, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, (case when "start"<[[startTime]] then [[startTime]] else "start" end ) as "start", (case when "end">[[endTime]] then [[endTime]] when "end" is null then (case when [[endTime]] < NOW() then [[endTime]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", last_updated_by FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE -- ( -- ("start"<[[startTime]] AND ("end" >[[startTime]] OR "end" IS NULL) ) -- OR -- ("start">=[[startTime]] AND "start"<[[endTime]] AND ("end" >"start" OR"end" IS NULL) ) -- ) "end" > [[startTime]] or "end" is null AND "start"<[[endTime]] AND ([[startTime]]<NOW()) AND uc_id=[[ucId]] AND loc_id=[[locId]] AND is_active =true ORDER BY "timestamp";

SELECT id, issue_id as source_id, issue_id::text as source_id_str, operator_id, machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, status_id, "start", "end", feedback, remark, "timestamp", last_updated_by, planned_downtime, machine_status_down FROM transactions.operator_feedback WHERE "start" > [[startTime]] AND ("end" < [[endTime]] OR "end" IS NULL) AND is_active = true AND uc_id = [[uc_id]] AND loc_id = [[loc_id]] order by "timestamp";
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_power_warning_log WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]] AND (recorded_at>=[[Start_Time]] AND recorded_at<=[[End_Time]])

/* ThingWorx SQL – per-minute scaffold + last-value fill */ WITH minute_series AS ( SELECT generate_series( date_trunc('minute', [[startTime]]::timestamp), date_trunc('minute', [[endTime]]::timestamp), interval '1 minute' ) AS report_time ), target_machines AS ( SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM transactions.machine_properties_log WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) ), raw AS ( SELECT machine_id, date_trunc('minute', "timestamp") AS minute_ts, CAST(property_value AS DECIMAL(10,0)) AS property_value FROM transactions.machine_properties_log WHERE property_name = 'Running Status' AND "timestamp" >= [[startTime]] AND "timestamp" < [[endTime]] AND machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) ), filled AS ( SELECT m.machine_id, m.report_time AS minute_ts, COALESCE( r.property_value, LAG(r.property_value) OVER (PARTITION BY m.machine_id ORDER BY m.report_time) ) AS property_value FROM (SELECT machine_id, report_time FROM minute_series CROSS JOIN target_machines) m LEFT JOIN raw r ON r.machine_id = m.machine_id AND r.minute_ts = m.report_time ) SELECT machine_id, to_char(minute_ts, 'Mon DD HH12:MI AM YYYY') AS created_at, minute_ts AS original_timestamp, property_value FROM filled ORDER BY machine_id, minute_ts ASC;

WITH machineStatusData as ( with combineData as ( select * from ( select '2000-01-01' as "timestamp", uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, -- (case -- when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] -- when end_date is null then -- (case -- when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] -- else NOW() -- end -- ) -- else end_date -- end -- ) as end_date, (case when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date)>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date)<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] when lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date) is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end) else lead(start_date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by start_date) end ) as end_date, act_status as status_id from transactions.machine_status as m where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null -- or -- end_date > start_date ) and start_date<[[selected_end_date]] and [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() and machine_id like concat([[machineId]],'%') and loc_id = [[locationId]] and uc_id = [[companyId]]
union
select "timestamp", uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date, status_id from transactions.operator_feedback where
( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id like concat([[machineId]],'%') and loc_id = [[locationId]] and uc_id = [[companyId]] and is_active = true ) as combined_data order by start_date ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from combineData union select machine_id, end_date from combineData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates ), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.status_id, D.start_time, D.end_time from combineData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id as act_status, (case when status_id='1001' then 'Idle' when status_id='1002' then 'Air Cut' when status_id='1003' then 'Cutting' when status_id='1000' then 'Idle' when status_id='1004' then 'Down' when status_id='1005' then 'Idle' else 'No Data' end ) as status, min(start_time) as start_date, max(end_time) as end_date -- grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_time) as grp from ( select timestamp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, start_time, end_time, case when coalesce(lag(end_time) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_time), start_time) <> start_time then 1 end rst from machineStatusData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, status_id, status order by machine_id, start_date

select loc_id, uc_id, machine_id, act_status, (case when act_status='1001' then 'Idle' when act_status='1002' then 'Air Cut' when act_status='1003' then 'Cutting' when act_status='1000' then 'Idle' when act_status='1004' then 'Down' when act_status='1005' then 'Idle' end ) as status, (case when start_date< [[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, (case when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when end_date is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else end_date end ) as end_date from transactions.machine_status_combine as m where ( (end_date > [[selected_start_date]] and end_date > start_date) or end_date is null ) and ( start_date< [[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]] <NOW() ) and machine_id like concat([[machineId]],'%') and loc_id = [[locationId]] and uc_id = [[companyId]] order by machine_id asc, start_date asc

WITH machineStatusData as ( with combineData as ( select * from ( select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when start_date<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else start_date end ) as start_date, (case when end_date>[[selected_end_date]] then [[selected_end_date]] when end_date is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else end_date end ) as end_date, act_status as status_id, '2000-01-01' as "timestamp" from transactions.machine_status as m where ( end_date > [[selected_start_date]] or end_date is null ) and ( start_date<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[locationId]] and uc_id = [[companyId]] union
select uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, (case when "start"<[[selected_start_date]] then [[selected_start_date]] else "start" end ) as start_date, (case when "end">[[selected_end_date]] then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) when "end" is null then (case when [[selected_end_date]] < NOW() then [[selected_end_date]] else NOW() end ) else "end" end ) as end_date, status_id, "timestamp" from transactions.operator_feedback where
( "end" > [[selected_start_date]] or "end" is null ) and ( "start"<[[selected_end_date]] ) and ( [[selected_start_date]]<NOW() ) and machine_id in (<<machineIdList>>) and loc_id = [[locationId]] and uc_id = [[companyId]] and is_active = true ) as combined_data order by start_date ), ValidDates as ( select machine_id, start_date as Date from combineData union select machine_id, end_date from combineData ), ValidDateRanges1 as ( select machine_id, Date as start_time, lead(Date,1) over (partition by machine_id order by Date) end_time from ValidDates ), ValidDateRanges as ( select machine_id, start_time, end_time from ValidDateRanges1 where end_time is not null )
SELECT DISTINCT on (machine_id, start_time, end_time) E.timestamp, E.uc_id, E.loc_id, E.machine_id, E.status_id, D.start_time, D.end_time from combineData E inner join ValidDateRanges D on E.machine_id = D.machine_id and E.end_date>D.start_time and E.start_date<D.end_time order by machine_id asc, start_time asc, end_time asc, timestamp desc )
