select machine_id, status_id as act_status, (case when status_id='1001' then 'Idle' when status_id='1002' then 'Air Cut' when status_id='1003' then 'Cutting' when status_id='1000' then 'Idle' when status_id='1004' then 'Down' when status_id='1005' then 'Idle' end ) as status, min(start_time) as start_date, max(end_time) as end_date -- grp from ( select *, sum(rst) over (order by machine_id, start_time) as grp from ( select machine_id, status_id, start_time, end_time, case when coalesce(lag(end_time) over (partition by machine_id order by status_id, machine_id, start_time), start_time) <> start_time then 1 end rst from machineStatusData ) t1 ) t2 group by grp, machine_id, status_id, status order by machine_id, start_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.shiftv2 WHERE shiftplan_id=[[shiftplan_id]] ORDER BY weekday

SELECT * FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 sp INNER JOIN transactions.shiftv2 sh ON sp.id=sh.shiftplan_id WHERE uc_id=[[ucId]] AND loc_id=[[locId]] AND machine_group=[[machineGroup]] AND start_date<=NOW() AND end_date>=NOW()
SELECT * FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 WHERE id=[[shiftplan_id]]

SELECT uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date, STRING_AGG(id::character varying, ',') shiftplan_ids FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] GROUP BY uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date

SELECT uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date, STRING_AGG(id::character varying, ',') shiftplan_ids FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND machine_group=[[machine_group]] GROUP BY uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date
SELECT * FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND machine_group=[[machine_group]] AND start_date=[[start_date]] AND machine_id=[[machine_id]]

SELECT name, start_time, end_time, weekday, STRING_AGG(transactions.shiftv2.id::character varying, ',') shift_ids FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 JOIN transactions.shiftv2 ON transactions.shiftplanv2.id=transactions.shiftv2.shiftplan_id WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND machine_group=[[machine_group]] GROUP BY uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date, name, start_time, end_time, weekday ORDER BY weekday

SELECT name, start_time, end_time, weekday, STRING_AGG(transactions.shiftv2.id::character varying, ',') shift_ids, timezoneoffset, daylightsavingtimeactive, hasdaylightsavingtime FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 JOIN transactions.shiftv2 ON transactions.shiftplanv2.id=transactions.shiftv2.shiftplan_id WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND machine_group=[[machine_group]] AND start_date=[[start_date]] GROUP BY uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date, name, start_time, end_time, weekday, timezoneoffset, daylightsavingtimeactive, hasdaylightsavingtime ORDER BY weekday, start_time

SELECT name, start_time, end_time, weekday, STRING_AGG(transactions.shiftv2.id::character varying, ',') shift_ids, timezoneoffset, daylightsavingtimeactive, hasdaylightsavingtime FROM transactions.shiftplanv2 JOIN transactions.shiftv2 ON transactions.shiftplanv2.id=transactions.shiftv2.shiftplan_id WHERE uc_id=[[uc_id]] AND loc_id=[[loc_id]] AND machine_group=[[machine_group]] AND start_date=[[start_date]] AND end_date=[[end_date]] GROUP BY uc_id, loc_id, machine_group, start_date, end_date, name, start_time, end_time, weekday, timezoneoffset, daylightsavingtimeactive, hasdaylightsavingtime ORDER BY weekday, start_time

/* * @name QueryStatusRawOrderByIdDesc * @date 13.07.2021 * @author Georg Reckendorfer * @return Infotable Status (uc_id, loc_id, machine_id, start_date, end_date, reason) * * [13.07.2021] [Georg Reckendorfer] [Initial Setup] */
SELECT * FROM transactions.status ORDER BY id DESC;

SELECT et.id, date_part('year',et.start_Date) AS Year, et.start_Date::text,et.end_date::text, et.start_time::text AS start_time, et.end_time::text AS end_time, et.tarrif_desc_id, etd.loc_id,etd.uc_id, etd.key,etd.amount,etd.currency FROM transactions.energy_tarrifs et LEFT JOIN transactions.energy_tarrif_desc etd ON et.tarrif_desc_id=etd.id WHERE etd.loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND etd.uc_id=[[UC_ID]] ORDER BY et.start_date ASC
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_tarrif_desc WHERE loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND uc_id=[[UC_ID]]
SELECT * FROM transactions.energy_tarrif_desc Where key=[[Key]]::tariff_key_enum AND currency=UPPER([[Currency]]) AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND uc_id=[[UC_ID]]

SELECT MIN((DATE(start_date))) AS timestamp , SUM(total_occurrence) AS total_occurrence , SUM(total_duration) AS total_duration FROM transactions.downtime_overview WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND reason IN (<<downtimeReason>>) AND DATE("start_date") < DATE([[selected_end_date]]) AND DATE("end_date") > DATE([[selected_start_date]]) AND [[selected_start_date]] < NOW() AND is_active IS TRUE

SELECT machine_id, -- SUM(total_power) AS energy_used FROM total_used_energy AS energy_used FROM transactions.energy_hourly WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND (open_date>=[[Start_Time]] AND open_date<[[End_Time]]) -- GROUP BY machine_id

SELECT MIN(DATE(start_date)) AS timestamp, SUM(running) AS running, SUM(idle) AS idle, SUM(down) AS down, SUM(no_data) AS no_data FROM transactions.machine_oee_overview WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineIdList>>) AND DATE("start_date") < [[selected_end_date]] AND DATE("end_date") > [[selected_start_date]] AND [[selected_start_date]] < NOW() AND is_active = TRUE -- AND is_included = TRUE
select * FROM transactions.energy_by_machine_id_pct e
SELECT * from transactions.machine_status
select * from transactions.uee_hourly where period_start> '2026-02-09' and machine_id='C_C04'

select * from transactions.machine_properties_log limit 10
-- SELECT -- date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS report_hour, -- Changed to timestamp -- SUM(CAST(property_value AS DECIMAL(10,0))) AS property_value -- FROM transactions.machine_properties_log -- WHERE machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) -- Equality/List check -- AND property_name = [[property_name]] -- Equality check -- AND "timestamp" >= [[startDate]] -- Range check (Partition Key) -- AND "timestamp" < [[endDate]] -- Range check (Partition Key) -- AND EXTRACT(hour FROM "timestamp") IN (0, 6, 12, 18) -- Filter specific hours -- GROUP BY 1 -- ORDER BY 1 ASC;

--We are using UEE table for TUT and UEE as it has period start and period end date
select machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.uee_daily where machine_id IN (<<machineId>>) and uc_id = [[ucId]] and loc_id = [[locId]] and machine_group = [[machineGroup]] and period_start>=[[periodStart]] and period_end<=[[periodEnd]] order by period_start asc;

-- select * from -- transactions.tut_daily -- order by week_start desc
-- HPMC.Core.TUT.MaterialisedView.DS select status_date, machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.tut_daily where uc_id = [[ucId]] and machine_id = [[machineId]] and loc_id = [[locId]] and status_date=[[week]] order by status_date asc;

select -- week_start, -- machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.tut_yearly where machine_id = [[machineId]] and uc_id = [[ucId]] and loc_id = [[locId]] and year_start=[[week]] order by year_start asc;

select machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.uee_daily where machine_id = [[machineId]] and uc_id = [[ucId]] and loc_id = [[locId]] and machine_group = [[machineGroup]] and period_start=[[week]] order by period_start asc;

select machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.uee_monthly where machine_id =[[machineId]] and uc_id=[[ucId]] and loc_id=[[locId]] and machine_group= [[machineGroup]] and period_start=[[week]] order by period_start asc

select machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.uee_quarterly where machine_id =[[machineId]] and uc_id=[[ucId]] and loc_id=[[locId]] and machine_group= [[machineGroup]] and period_start=[[week]] order by period_start asc

select machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.uee_weekly where machine_id = [[machineId]] and uc_id = [[ucId]] and loc_id = [[locId]] and machine_group = [[machineGroup]] and period_start=[[week]] order by period_start asc;

select machine_id, v_status_time_1001 as s_1001, v_status_time_1002 as s_1002, v_status_time_1003 as s_1003, v_status_time_1004 as s_1004 from transactions.uee_yearly where machine_id =[[machineId]] and uc_id=[[ucId]] and loc_id=[[locId]] and machine_group= [[machineGroup]] and period_start=[[week]] order by period_start asc

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Set is_active to FALSE to all entries for specific maintenance item after planned_maintenance_date and returning the planned maintenance date of each updated data -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [08 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development -- [DONE] [09 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added is_active parameter in WHERE clause and updated_at -- [DONE] [14 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Modified Filter (WHERE clause), Input Parameter: item_id and planned_maintenance_date -- [DONE] [10 APR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added returning planned date of each updated data --------------------------------------------------------------
UPDATE transactions.machine_maintenance_log SET is_active = FALSE , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_id = [[item_id]] AND planned_maintenance_date > [[planned_maintenance_date]] AND is_active = TRUE RETURNING planned_maintenance_date;
UPDATE transactions.energy_email_config SET email=[[Email]], active=[[Active]], machine_type=[[Machine_Type]] WHERE id=[[Config_ID]]
UPDATE transactions.energy_threshold_config SET power_warning=[[Power_Warning]] WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]]
UPDATE transactions.energy_threshold_config SET warning_status=[[Warning_Status]] WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]]
UPDATE transactions.energy_config SET v=[[Voltage]],pf1=[[PF1]],pf2=[[PF2]],pf3=[[PF3]] WHERE uc_id=[[UC_ID]] AND loc_id=[[Loc_ID]] AND machine_id=[[Machine_ID]]
UPDATE transactions.holidaycalendar SET uc_id=[[uc_id]] , loc_id=[[loc_id]] , holiday_name=[[holiday_name]] , holiday_date=[[holiday_date]] WHERE id=[[id]];

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Update is_maintenance_overdue property for each machine -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [08 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development -- [DONE] [09 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added is_active parameter in WHERE clause and created_at parameter -- [DONE] [20 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Modified Update Query into Upsert Query --------------------------------------------------------------
WITH tmp AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (uc_id, loc_id, machine_id) machine_id , loc_id , uc_id , 'is_maintenance_overdue' AS property_name , CASE WHEN status = 'Overdue' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS status , NULL AS unit , 'boolean' AS data_type , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS timestamp , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS created_at , 'Machine Maintenance' AS source FROM transactions.machine_maintenance_log WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY loc_id ASC , uc_id ASC , machine_id ASC , status DESC )
INSERT INTO transactions.machine_properties_overview ( machine_id , loc_id , uc_id , property_name , property_value , unit , data_type , timestamp , created_at , source ) SELECT * FROM tmp ON CONFLICT (machine_id, loc_id, uc_id, property_name) DO UPDATE SET property_value = excluded.property_value , timestamp = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATE transactions.shiftplanv2 SET machine_group=[[machine_group]] WHERE id=[[id]];

-------------------------------------------------------------- -- DESCRIPTION -- Update maintenance log entry in DB -------------------------------------------------------------- -- Revision Date Who What -- [DONE] [08 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Initial Development -- [DONE] [09 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added actual_maintenance_date and updated_at as Input Parameter -- [DONE] [14 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Added input maintenance_by -- [DONE] [21 MAR 2023] [Muhammad Salman Al Farisyi] Deleted Some Input in Where Clause --------------------------------------------------------------
UPDATE transactions.machine_maintenance_log SET remark = [[remark]] , uploaded_files = [[uploaded_files]] , is_complete = [[is_complete]] , status = [[status]] , actual_maintenance_date = [[actual_maintenance_date]] , maintenance_by = [[maintenance_by]] , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_id = [[item_id]] AND planned_maintenance_date = [[planned_maintenance_date]] AND is_active = TRUE;

UPDATE transactions.operator_feedback SET operator_id=[[operatorId]], machine_id=[[machineId]], loc_id=[[locId]]::integer, uc_id=[[ucId]]::integer, status_id=[[machineStatusId]], "start"=[[startTime]], "end"=[[endTime]], feedback=[[feedback]], remark=[[remark]], "timestamp"=[[timestamp]] WHERE id=[[feedbackId]];
UPDATE transactions.machine_parameter_master SET pic = '' WHERE machine_id = [[machine_id]] AND id = [[id]] RETURNING id;

UPDATE transactions.machine_parameter_master SET unit = [[unit]], status = [[status]], upper_bound = [[upper_bound]], lower_bound =[[lower_bound]], message = [[message]], parameter_desc = [[parameter_desc]], pic =[[pic]] WHERE id = [[parameter_id]] RETURNING id;

UPDATE transactions.shiftv2 SET "name"=[[shift_name]], start_time=[[start_time]], end_time=[[end_time]], weekday=[[weekday]], timezoneoffset=[[timezoneoffset]], daylightsavingtimeactive=[[daylightsavingtimeactive]], hasDayLightSavingTime=[[hasDayLightSavingTime]] WHERE id=[[shift_id]]
UPDATE transactions.shiftplanv2 SET uc_id=[[uc_id]], loc_id=[[loc_id]] , machine_group=[[machine_group]] , start_date=[[starte_date]] , end_date=[[end_date]] WHERE id=[[id]];

UPDATE transactions.energy_tarrifs SET start_date=[[Start_Date]]::date, end_date=[[End_Date]]::date, start_time=[[Start_Time]]::time, end_time=[[End_Time]]::time, tarrif_desc_id=[[Tariff_Desc_ID]] WHERE id=[[Config_ID]]
UPDATE transactions.energy_tarrif_desc SET amount=[[Amount]] WHERE key=[[Key]]::tariff_key_enum AND currency=[[Currency]] AND id=[[Tariff_Desc_ID]]

INSERT INTO transactions.user_maintenance_operator_suggestion_list ( username, maintenance_operator, created_at )
VALUES ( [[username]], [[maintenance_operator]], CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) RETURNING maintenance_operator;
select distinct week_start as week from transactions.tut_Weekly order by week_start desc
select distinct period_start as week from transactions.uee_weekly order by period_start desc
select distinct year_start as week from transactions.TUT_Yearly order by year_start desc
select distinct period_start as week from transactions.uee_yearly order by period_start desc
